---
title: "cache.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/skills_db/cachebro/packages/sdk/src/cache.ts"
loc: 249
complexity: 23
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 4.89
overall_score: 2.75
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 34 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [connect](file://@tursodatabase/database)
- [computeDiff](file://./differ.js)
- [CacheConfig](file://./types.js)
- [CacheStats](file://./types.js)
- [FileReadResult](file://./types.js)
- [createHash](file://crypto)

### Exports
- `SCHEMA`
- `estimateTokens`
- `contentHash`
- `connect`
- `CacheStore`
- `db`
- `absPath`
- `currentContent`
- `currentHash`
- `allLines`
- `currentLines`
- `now`
- `offset`
- `limit`
- `isPartial`
- `sliceLines`
- `lines`
- `start`
- `end`
- `rangeStart`
- `rangeEnd`
- `rangeLineCount`
- `lastRead`
- `lastHash`
- `slicedTokens`
- `label`
- `oldVersion`
- `oldContent`
- `diffResult`
- `rangeHasChanges`
- `l`
- `slicedTokens`
- `sliced`
- `fullTokens`
- `fullTokens`
- `diffTokens`
- `saved`
- `content`
- `content`
- `db`
- `absPath`
- `currentContent`
- `currentHash`
- `currentLines`
- `now`
- `db`
- `absPath`
- `db`
- `versions`
- `tokens`
- `sessionTokens`
- `filesTracked`
- `db`
- `db`
